title: Auto mod (LAN supported)
description: Whenever a player joins a server, they will automatically get /op (operator permissions) after 5 seconds.
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, please join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

---

Automatically makes every player that joins your world an operator after 5 seconds (to ensure the mod works properly, since some players load in slower than others). This mod will also work via essential mod. Since single player worlds don't have a /op command, a mod called "LAN operators" by Flooflez is used to make this mod work.

---
